# PicoWorker

> PicoWorker (picoworker.xyz) is a two-sided micro-task marketplace where people earn instant USDC for small online tasks and businesses post tasks and pay per verified result. Free to join. Payouts in USDC on Solana.

## What PicoWorker is
PicoWorker is a micro-task platform. Earners complete tiny online tasks and get paid in USDC. Businesses fund campaigns in USDC and only pay for verified completions.

## How earners use it
- Sign up free and get a $0.05 welcome bonus.
- Pick a task from the live feed: follow on X, watch a video, install and test an app, take a survey, or a custom task.
- Most tasks auto verify in about 10 seconds. Manual tasks are approved by the task giver.
- USDC rewards are added to your wallet instantly. Withdraw to a Solana wallet.
- Earn a daily check in bonus and 10 percent of everything the people you refer earn, for life.

## How businesses use it
- Fund a campaign in USDC, set the reward and the quantity.
- Get real followers, views, app installs, and survey responses.
- Funds sit in escrow and you only pay per verified result.

## Key facts
- Payment currency: USDC on the Solana network.
- Free to join for earners.
- Two sides: earners (workers) and businesses (task posters).

## Common questions
- What is PicoWorker? A micro-task marketplace that pays in USDC for small online tasks.
- How do I earn money on PicoWorker? Sign up free, complete tasks from the feed, and get paid in USDC instantly.
- Is PicoWorker free? Yes, joining and earning is free.
- How do I get paid? In USDC, withdrawn to a Solana wallet.

## Links
- Home: https://picoworker.xyz/
- Sign up or log in: https://picoworker.xyz/login
